description: Māori Language Guard layer: Unicode NFC macron normalisation, spaCy tokenizer exception rules for Te Reo Māori lexical atoms, and lingua-rs phrase-level language identification (Te Reo Māori vs English).
oracle_notes: Archived after verifying the repo-side Māori guard modules and focused tests for Unicode NFC/macron normalization, spaCy tokenizer exceptions, and optional lingua-rs language identification.
